column1: # Derived i-adjectives — productive 〜やすい / 〜にくい / 〜っぽい suffixes.
# Belongs here: adjectives built from a verb stem + やすい/にくい (easy/hard to
# ~) or a noun/stem + っぽい (-ish / -looking). They inflect as i-adjectives, so
# type stays i-adjective. Plain lexical i-adjectives go in the vocab decks.

column4: easy to eat (〜やすい, from 食べる)
easy to understand (〜やすい, from 分かる)
easy to use (〜やすい, from 使う)
hard to read (〜にくい, from 読む)
hard to see (〜にくい, from 見る)
